1:
On Emerald Avenue, you encounter an effusive fellow spreading word of the Gold Saucer festivities. Having caught your attention, he shares news of a rumor regarding the venerated Triple Triad player, King Elmer III. He stops short of sharing any pertinent details, however, instead directing you to speak with Ollier the attendant in Entrance Square should this tidbit have piqued your interest.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
